$comment: G-23n — Crawl allowlist example. readyForLiveCrawl=false by default. No live URLs. No secrets.
purpose: G-23n-live-crawl-allowlist-config — structure and deny rules only; not armed for live crawl

deniedTargets.label: example-com

deniedTargets.label: sariswing-production-ref

deniedTargets.label: fixture-placeholder

notes: G-23n validates allowlist structure only — no DNS / HTTP / crawl execution
Set readyForLiveCrawl=true only in G-23o+ with operator approval and real sourceUrl
explicitCrawlApprovalId must be registered before any live crawl-dry-run
